Reservations across fleets, branches, cu: Reservations across fleets, branches, customers, and vehicles.
Select customer and vehicle, validate da: Select customer and vehicle, validate dates, then confirm the reservation.
Create a booking after selecting a custo: Create a booking after selecting a customer and an available vehicle.
Complete customer basic information befo: Complete customer basic information before booking
End date cannot be before start date: End date cannot be before start date
Return date cannot be before start date: Return date cannot be before start date
Hint Booking Customer: Select the customer who should own this reservation.
Hint Booking Vehicle: Select the available vehicle to attach to this booking.
Hint Booking Branch: Enter the operational branch number linked to this booking.
Hint Booking Start Date: Set the booking contract start date.
Hint Booking End Date: Set the expected booking end date.
Hint Booking Return Date: Set the actual or expected vehicle return date.
Hint Booking Total: Enter the total booking value before final settlement.
Hint Booking Daily Price: Enter the daily vehicle price for this booking.
Hint Booking Monthly Price: Enter the monthly price when the booking spans a long duration.
Example Booking Notes: Example: Delivery from the main branch is included in this booking.
